# flashduty_route (Data Source)

Retrieves routing configuration for a shared alert integration from Flashduty.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get route by integration ID
data "flashduty_route" "main" {
  integration_id = 5592304204454
}

# Use the route data
output "route_version" {
  value = data.flashduty_route.main.version
}

output "route_status" {
  value = data.flashduty_route.main.status
}

output "default_channels" {
  value = data.flashduty_route.main.default != null ? data.flashduty_route.main.default.channel_ids : []
}

output "route_cases_count" {
  value = data.flashduty_route.main.cases != null ? length(data.flashduty_route.main.cases) : 0
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `integration_id` (Number) The ID of the shared alert integration.

### Read-Only

- `cases` (Attributes List) Conditional routing rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cases))
- `created_at` (Number) The timestamp when the route was created.
- `default` (Attributes) Default routing configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--default))
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the route.
- `sections` (Attributes List) Section dividers in route rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sections))
- `status` (String) The status of the route.
- `updated_at` (Number) The timestamp when the route was last updated.
- `version` (Number) The version number of the route configuration.

<a id="nestedatt--cases"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cases`

Read-Only:

- `channel_ids` (List of Number) Target channel IDs.
- `fallthrough` (Boolean) Whether to continue matching after this rule.
- `if` (Attributes List) Filter conditions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cases--if))
- `name_mapping_label` (String) Label key for name mapping mode.
- `routing_mode` (String) Routing mode.

<a id="nestedatt--cases--if"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cases.if`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String) The attribute or label key.
- `oper` (String) The operator.
- `vals` (List of String) The values to match.



<a id="nestedatt--default"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default`

Read-Only:

- `channel_ids` (List of Number) Default target channel IDs.


<a id="nestedatt--sections"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sections`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Section name.
- `position` (Number) Position.
